title: APUSH
html:
APUSH

Stub. AP US History — Yahir's senior-year (2019-20) AP class. Surfaces in the Aug 22 schedule swap note ("switch AP US for Ms.Mac" — preferring the teacher) and in the Dec 12 Brenda todo ("APUSH REVIEW — Gotten"). Together they document Yahir choosing the right teacher and then keeping pace through review. Part of the teen era AP/scholarship pipeline that lands the Ford full-ride.

Connections

grants pass teen era · ford family foundation · fbla · brenda aguilera
